title: Pattern 82
content:
Power Up Your Woo Store

Must-Have Features Built to Boost Sales and Simplicity

Effortless Cart Interaction Without Leaving the Page

Provide your shoppers with a floating cart experience that stays with them wherever they go on your site. The Quick Cart View allows users to see what’s in their cart, adjust quantities, or remove items instantly without reloading or navigating away.

Check It Out
Turn Every Checkout into a Revenue Opportunity

Smart Offers uses intelligent targeting to suggest additional products or services to your customers right at the point of checkout. These offers are contextually relevant, personalized based on the shopper’s cart, and can be fully customized in terms of design and trigger rules.

See Smart Deals
Capture Attention and Drive Urgency with Dynamic Banners

The Live Deal Bar lets you display floating, attention-grabbing messages at the top or bottom of any page. It’s ideal for promoting flash sales, shipping offers, limited-time discounts, or seasonal campaigns—keeping your visitors engaged and nudging them toward action.

Try Promo Bar
Build Social Proof with Authentic Sales Popups

Real-Time Buzz displays small notifications on your store showing recent activity like purchases, reviews, or product views. This creates a sense of liveliness and authenticity, making your store feel trusted and well-trafficked—just like a busy real-world shop.

Preview Buzz
Streamlined Checkout That Reduces Cart Abandonment

Express Purchase shortens the buyer’s journey by skipping unnecessary steps and taking users directly to the checkout page from a product listing or detail view. This feature is perfect for impulse buys, limited stock items, or flash sales where speed matters.

Go Fast
